detail.title: Career Detail
detail.not_found_msg: SOC code {soc} is not in our database.

detail.tuition_unavailable: Tuition data unavailable for this program.
detail.breakeven_note: The crossover point is where your degree starts paying for itself.

calculator.title: ROI Calculator
calculator.help_annual_tuition: How much you pay per year for school (tuition + fees).
calculator.help_education_years: How many years you need to study for this degree.
calculator.help_post_degree_salary: What you'd earn per year after graduating.
calculator.help_baseline_salary: What you'd earn per year without this degree (e.g., working right after high school).
calculator.help_salary_growth: How much your salary goes up each year (typically 2–3%).
calculator.help_discount_rate: Accounts for money being worth more today than in the future. Think of it as the "impatience factor" — a higher rate means you value having money sooner.
calculator.help_career_years: How many years you plan to work in this career.
calculator.help_loan_rate: The interest rate charged on your student loan.
calculator.help_loan_term: How many years to pay back the loan.
calculator.chart_cashflow_label: Bar chart showing annual cash flow: negative during education, positive during career years
calculator.chart_cumulative_label: Line chart showing cumulative net value over career duration

compare.title: Compare Careers
compare.subtitle: Select 2–3 careers to compare ROI side by side.
compare.no_selection: Select at least 2 careers to compare.
compare.empty_hint: Pick two careers above, then hit Compare to see salary, cost, and ROI side by side.
compare.chart_label: Bar chart comparing salary, ROI, and breakeven year across selected careers
compare.salary_note: * BLS salary unavailable; using estimated baseline

ipeds.discounted_roi_desc: Present-value ROI accounting for the time value of money
ipeds.risk_adjusted_desc: Expected ROI weighted by graduation probability
ipeds.competition_adjusted_desc: Expected ROI after graduation risk and job market competition
ipeds.fallback_no_grad: Graduation rate unavailable — risk adjustment not applied
ipeds.fallback_no_competition: Employment data unavailable — competition adjustment not applied
ipeds.competition_sensitivity_tip: Higher values = greater impact of job competition on ROI
ipeds.max_penalty_tip: Maximum ROI reduction due to job market competition

footer.data: Data: BLS OES, College Scorecard & IPEDS

disclaimer.us_data_body: All salary, tuition, and employment data is sourced from U.S. federal agencies (BLS, IPEDS, College Scorecard). If you are outside the U.S., use this as a reference for studying or working in the United States only.

glossary.roi: Return on Investment — how long it takes to earn back what you spent on education.
glossary.npv: Net Present Value — total value of future earnings minus costs, adjusted for time.
glossary.irr: Internal Rate of Return — the annual growth rate your education investment earns.
glossary.bls: Bureau of Labor Statistics — the U.S. government agency that tracks jobs and wages.
glossary.ipeds: Integrated Postsecondary Education Data System — federal database of college statistics.
glossary.soc: Standard Occupational Classification — a code system for categorizing jobs.
glossary.cip: Classification of Instructional Programs — a code system for categorizing college majors.
glossary.breakeven: The year when your total earnings premium exceeds total education costs.

education.Less than a High School Diploma: Less than a High School Diploma

quiz.title: Find Your Path
quiz.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions to discover careers that match you.
quiz.q1_a: I like solving puzzles and figuring out how things work
quiz.q1_b: I like working with people and helping them
quiz.q2: What's your idea of a fun project?
quiz.q2_a: Building or coding something from scratch
quiz.q2_b: Designing something beautiful or writing a story
quiz.q3_a: I look at the data and evidence
quiz.q3_b: I go with my gut feeling and creativity
quiz.q4: In a group project, you'd rather…
quiz.q4_a: Plan the strategy and crunch the numbers
quiz.q4_b: Lead the team and present the results
quiz.result_prefix: Based on your answers, you might enjoy:
